tasks.title: RED: Failing tests for git-finalize helpers
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `plugin/src/tools/archive-helpers/git-finalize.test.ts` covering Phase 9 helper contracts: main checkout resolution from linked worktree, default-branch detection, main checkout invariants, change branch reachability, clean merge, conflict abort/no-stash behavior, push policy failure/skip reporting, archive mode defaults/PR gh validation, and dirty-trunk finalization blocking.
tasks.summary: Added `plugin/src/tools/archive-helpers/git-finalize.test.ts` covering Phase 9 helper contracts: main checkout resolution from linked worktree, default-branch detection, main checkout invariants, change branch reachability, clean merge, conflict abort/no-stash behavior, push policy failure/skip reporting, archive mode defaults/PR gh validation, and dirty-trunk finalization blocking.
tasks.verification: RED phase complete. Targeted test exits 1 because `./git-finalize` module is missing, proving the helper contract is not implemented yet. Checkpoint commit 8ae00c84989633b3472d30f9d83752a3bc9d0549 recorded.

tasks.title: GREEN: Implement git-finalize.ts helpers
tasks.implementation_summary: Created `plugin/src/tools/archive-helpers/git-finalize.ts` with Phase 9 helper exports: `resolveMainCheckout`, `detectDefaultBranch`, `verifyMainInvariants`, `verifyChangeBranchReachable`, `mergeChangeBranch`/`mergeToTrunk`, `pushToOrigin`, `detectArchiveMode`, and `finalizeRelease`. Helpers use `spawnSync`-backed git operations, use `git -C`/cwd main checkout semantics, hard-block dirty/mismatched main, avoid stash/checkout/switch, report push failures as `merged_locally`, and preserve idempotent already-reachable handling.
tasks.summary: Created `plugin/src/tools/archive-helpers/git-finalize.ts` with Phase 9 helper exports: `resolveMainCheckout`, `detectDefaultBranch`, `verifyMainInvariants`, `verifyChangeBranchReachable`, `mergeChangeBranch`/`mergeToTrunk`, `pushToOrigin`, `detectArchiveMode`, and `finalizeRelease`. Helpers use `spawnSync`-backed git operations, use `git -C`/cwd main checkout semantics, hard-block dirty/mismatched main, avoid stash/checkout/switch, report push failures as `merged_locally`, and preserve idempotent already-reachable handling.
tasks.verification: Implemented git-finalize helpers and verified. Targeted helper tests pass (9); typecheck passes. Checkpoint commit fbcaf618deff6a970a74af538d183e763ca6ec78 recorded.

tasks.title: Add archive_mode + auto_push config + types
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended `ProjectConfigSchema` with `archive_mode: "direct" | "pr"` defaulting to `direct` and `auto_push` defaulting to true. Added structural tests for defaults, PR opt-out, auto-push override, and invalid archive-mode rejection. Updated `store-disk.ts` manual default project config and SETUP project initialization docs to mention optional archive finalization overrides.
tasks.summary: Extended `ProjectConfigSchema` with `archive_mode: "direct" | "pr"` defaulting to `direct` and `auto_push` defaulting to true. Added structural tests for defaults, PR opt-out, auto-push override, and invalid archive-mode rejection. Updated `store-disk.ts` manual default project config and SETUP project initialization docs to mention optional archive finalization overrides.
tasks.verification: Added archive finalization config fields and verified. Tests passed: project config + git-finalize helper tests (15). Typecheck passed after updating the manual store-disk default config. Checkpoint commit 2a65bb28ce7284f5b8ba1363fd4fde8317ba4406 recorded.

tasks.title: RED: Failing test for release-gate precondition
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `plugin/src/tools/gate.release-enforcement.test.ts` with tests for release-gate reachability enforcement. The red test mocks git-finalize reachability as false and expects `RELEASE_REQUIRES_TRUNK_MERGE`, `rq-releaseFinalization01`, and `/adv-archive {id}` remediation with no signal fired; current implementation fails that rejection path, as intended.
tasks.summary: Added `plugin/src/tools/gate.release-enforcement.test.ts` with tests for release-gate reachability enforcement. The red test mocks git-finalize reachability as false and expects `RELEASE_REQUIRES_TRUNK_MERGE`, `rq-releaseFinalization01`, and `/adv-archive {id}` remediation with no signal fired; current implementation fails that rejection path, as intended.
tasks.verification: RED phase complete. Targeted gate test exits 1: rejection assertion fails because `parsed.error` is undefined, proving `adv_gate_complete release` currently allows completion without trunk-merge reachability. Checkpoint commit a1a37af4e35ed0d30ad55e6fb024bdb20b3a1542 recorded.

tasks.title: GREEN: Wire release-gate precondition in gate.ts
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `plugin/src/tools/gate.ts` so `adv_gate_complete` blocks `gateId: "release"` in direct archive mode when `change/{id}` is not reachable from the default branch. The structured error uses code `RELEASE_REQUIRES_TRUNK_MERGE`, cites `rq-releaseFinalization01`, lists unmerged commits, and points to `/adv-archive {id}` remediation. Added passing release-enforcement tests and adjusted an existing gate cache-refresh unit test to use acceptance rather than release because release now has a structural precondition.
tasks.summary: Updated `plugin/src/tools/gate.ts` so `adv_gate_complete` blocks `gateId: "release"` in direct archive mode when `change/{id}` is not reachable from the default branch. The structured error uses code `RELEASE_REQUIRES_TRUNK_MERGE`, cites `rq-releaseFinalization01`, lists unmerged commits, and points to `/adv-archive {id}` remediation. Added passing release-enforcement tests and adjusted an existing gate cache-refresh unit test to use acceptance rather than release because release now has a structural precondition.
tasks.verification: Wired release-gate trunk-merge precondition and verified. Targeted gate tests pass (18); typecheck passes. Checkpoint commit 8bc09c9707981f98016611dcc6197012cc0561c0 recorded.

tasks.title: Full verification + backward-compat smoke
tasks.verification: Review remediation completed and verified: targeted review re-check APPROVED; pnpm run check passed; pnpm test passed (215 files passed, 2671 tests passed, 1 skipped file, 2 skipped tests); pnpm run build passed.

wisdom.content: When adding defaulted fields to `ProjectConfigSchema`, Zod's parsed output type treats them as required. Any code constructing a parsed `ProjectConfig` manually (e.g. `store-disk.ts` default config passed to `saveProjectConfig`) must add the new defaulted fields too, or `tsc` fails even though parser callers are fine.

proposal.approval_evidence: Fast-track via /adv-task. User confirmed Quick Contract before this gate; proposal artifact rendered with full intent, LBP targets, scope, success criteria, non-goals, risks.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings: spec rq-releaseFinalization01 already declares trunk-merge as MUST law (4 scenarios, lines 356-423 of advance-workflow spec). Phase 9 markdown contract complete in adv-archive.md lines 206-446. Gap is purely structural: no enforcement at adv_gate_complete or adv_change_archive level. Researcher CONFIRMED architectural approach against gh CLI, release-it, release-please, changesets, semantic-release patterns with 6 minor refinements incorporated. No remaining ambiguity.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by adv-researcher: CONFIRMED. Pure helper module (git-finalize.ts) + gate-precondition + archive-tool integration + config opt-out matches release-it/gh CLI patterns. No contract-compromise risk. 6 researcher recommendations incorporated in proposal (gh availability check, exit-code handling, named mergeToTrunk, no stash, --no-push flag, branch-protection visibility). Bundle->merge->push ordering confirmed correct for retry safety. Idempotency contract explicit.

planning.approval_evidence: Fast-track via /adv-task: user confirmed Quick Contract before Phase 1; task graph follows researcher-CONFIRMED design (extract Phase 9 to helpers, gate-precondition enforces structurally, archive-tool integrates with idempotency, spec delta + docs sync). 9 tasks: 3 RED/GREEN pairs (helpers, gate, archive) + config + spec/docs + verification. Dependency chain: helpers RED→GREEN unblocks gate+archive RED tracks + config, both GREEN tracks unblock spec/docs, all unblock verification. Command-as-approval: user invoked /adv-task explicitly.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete: all 9 tasks done. Verification evidence: `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test` (215 test files passed, 2662 tests passed), and `pnpm run build` passed; working tree clean.
